name: autoresearch
command: senkani exec --tool senkani_search_web --args '{"query":"<topic>","limit":8}' | ollama run gemma3:9b "Summarize these search results in 5 specific bullet points." > ~/.senkani/research/$(date +%F).md
description: Daily 06:00 topic scan: search the web, pipe results through a local LLM, land a dated research note.
